title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: Join our engineering team to design and build scalable web applications for enterprise and growth-stage clients across India.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in full stack development
Strong proficiency in React, Node.js, and TypeScript
Experience with REST APIs and relational databases
Understanding of software architecture and code review practices
Excellent communication skills in English

title: React Native Developer
description: Build high-quality cross-platform mobile applications with offline support, smooth performance, and clean integration with backend services.
requirements: 3+ years of React Native development experience
Published apps on Google Play and/or App Store
Knowledge of mobile UI patterns and performance optimisation
Experience with push notifications and device APIs
Familiarity with CI/CD for mobile releases

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive, visually refined interfaces for web and mobile products, collaborating closely with developers and product stakeholders.
requirements: 3+ years of UI/UX design experience for digital products
Strong portfolio demonstrating web and mobile work
Proficiency in Figma and design systems
Understanding of accessibility and responsive design
Ability to translate business requirements into user flows

title: .NET Developer
description: Develop and maintain enterprise applications using .NET technologies, with focus on performance, security, and maintainable architecture.
requirements: 4+ years of experience with .NET Core / ASP.NET
Solid knowledge of C#, SQL Server, and Entity Framework
Experience building APIs and integrating third-party services
Understanding of authentication and authorisation patterns
Experience in Agile delivery environments

title: QA Engineer
description: Ensure product quality through structured test planning, automation, and close collaboration with development teams throughout the SDLC.
requirements: 3+ years of software testing experience
Experience with manual and automated testing
Knowledge of test case design and bug tracking tools
Familiarity with API testing and regression suites
Attention to detail and clear documentation habits

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridge business and technology by gathering requirements, documenting workflows, and supporting successful software delivery for client projects.
requirements: 3+ years of business analysis experience in IT projects
Strong requirement gathering and documentation skills
Ability to create user stories, wireframes, and process maps
Experience working with development and QA teams
Excellent stakeholder communication skills

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Support cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment automation for client and internal software projects.
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or cloud engineering experience
Experience with AWS or Azure services
Knowledge of Docker, CI/CD, and infrastructure as code
Understanding of monitoring, logging, and incident response
Scripting skills in Bash or Python

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Grow your frontend skills by building responsive interfaces, implementing design systems, and collaborating on modern web applications.
requirements: 1–2 years of frontend development experience
Good knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React
Understanding of responsive and accessible UI development
Eagerness to learn and accept code review feedback
Basic understanding of Git workflows
